description: Style NoteA rare combination of style and comfort at a reasonable price, this pair of trousers from peter england is definitely a good choice. Pair these trousers with a crisp formal shirt for a day at office or with a  solid colour casual shirt for your weekend getaway.Product DetailsBrown full length pants, smart Fit, waistband with loops,  button and zipper closure,  two slant top stitched pockets in front, two buttoned welt pockets at back, top stitched outseam, adjustable hem, brand patch above back right pocketMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6 ' waist 34'') is wearing a size 34
